response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering across multiple languages and domains, but lacks direct experience with C++ (primary requirement) or Rust for routing/geospatial data pipelines. His background in geospatial projects (GISCollective) and low-latency systems (Dunnhumby) shows relevant skills, but his focus has been on web/mobile/IoT rather than routing tiling or high-scale distributed systems. His adaptability and problem-solving approach are strengths, but the gap in core technical requirements warrants a cautious 'maybe' for interview.
strengths: Proven expertise in geospatial data processing (GISCollective platform)
Strong background in low-latency systems and high-performance databases (Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated adaptability across multiple languages and tech stacks
concerns: No direct experience with C++ (primary requirement) or Rust for routing systems
Limited exposure to distributed systems concepts (fault tolerance, consistency, service discovery) in routing contexts
Current role (re:cinq) focuses on AI-agent infrastructure and full-stack web, not routing/tiling pipelines
